UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT 1930 MISSION STREET CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S FURTHER RESPONSES TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE FURTHER VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS NO LATER THAN AUG. 1, 2013 BY 4 P.M. BY PERSONAL SERVICE. IF FURTHER RESPONSES ARE AGREED UPON BY THE PARTIES DURING THIS MEET AND CONFER, PLAINTIFF MUST SERVE FURTHER VERIFIED AMENDED RESPONSES BY NO LATER THAN AUG. 15, 2013 BY 4:00PM. SANCTIONS ARE GRANTED AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND MR. HAMMOND IN THE AMOUNT OF $900.50 TO BE PAID TO DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL NO LATER THAN JULY 31, 2013 BY 4 P.M. PREVAILING PARTY PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE HARRY DORFMAN, CLERK K. LIU, CSR MEGHEN C. PALMA. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Ptlf'S Further Responses To Written Discovery And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-25-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Jennifer Thai (510-658-3600) appearing for Defendant and moving party / Atty. Steven Hammond (415-955-1915) appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

Argued, the court modified its tentative ruling, DEFENDANT 1930 MISSION STREET CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Further Responses To Written Discovery And Request For Sanctions is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall serve further verified responses without objections no later than Aug. 1, 2013 by 4 p.m. by personal service. If further responses are agreed upon by the parties during this meet and confer, plaintiff must serve further verified amended responses by no later than Aug. 15, 2013 by 4:00pm. Sanctions are granted against plaintiff and Mr. Hammond in the amount of $900.50 to be paid to Defendant's counsel no later than July 31, 2013 by 4 p.m. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Harry Dorfman, Clerk K. Liu, CSR Meghan C. Palma (415-747-8710). (D501)
